subject: Set defaultbranch=jakarta in .gitreview

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

See of chain of commits can be clubbed together in single review !

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2
> 
> See of chain of commits can be clubbed together in single review !

This should have been done immediately at the branch creation.

I don't understand what is the problem having several commits.
This is a known good practice,well documented and for example explained in Openstack wiki at 
https://wiki.openstack.org/wiki/GitCommitMessages .

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Sorry Dan your proposal is breaking the best practices.
The 2 other changes are cherry picked and then must be merged without any change if possible.

Please read https://docs.openstack.org/project-team-guide/stable-branches.html
I would have got -1 in OpenStack if I applied your proposal (I don't think someone would dare voting -2 in OpenStack for this kind of patches)

Patch Set 1:

My apologozies Dan I failed - KAPIL please see my comments
